info.name: Manavault User API
info.description: Complete User API collection for Manavault digital product marketplace

request.description:
Login with email and password to get access token

Request Fields:
- email (required, email format)
- password (required, string)
Retrieve the authenticated user's profile with payment method status

Retrieve the authenticated user's information with permissions

Response Fields:
- id (integer)
- name (string)
- email (string)
- is_approved (boolean)
- permissions (array of strings)
- created_at (ISO8601 string)
- updated_at (ISO8601 string)

List all users with pagination

Query Parameters:
- per_page (optional, integer, default: 10)

Search users based on criteria

Query Parameters:
- term (required, string, min: 2 characters)

Show a specific user with their details

Path Parameters:
- user_id (required, integer)

Approve a user account

Path Parameters:
- user_id (required, integer)

Revoke approval for a user account

Path Parameters:
- user_id (required, integer)

Assign roles to a user

Path Parameters:
- user_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- role_id (required, integer, must exist in roles table)

Display a listing of roles

Query Parameters:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- guard_name (optional, string, max: 255)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Store a newly created role with permissions and guard

Request Fields:
- name (required, string, max: 255, unique)
- guard_name (optional, string, max: 255)
- permission_ids (optional, array of integers, each must exist in permissions table)

Display the specified role with permissions

Path Parameters:
- role_id (required, integer)

Update the specified role with permissions and guard

Path Parameters:
- role_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- name (optional, string, max: 255, unique except for current role)
- guard_name (optional, string, max: 255)
- permission_ids (optional, array of integers, each must exist in permissions table)

Remove the specified role

Path Parameters:
- role_id (required, integer)

Display a listing of permissions

Query Parameters:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- guard_name (optional, string, max: 255)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Display a listing of modules with their permissions

Query Parameters:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- slug (optional, string, max: 255)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Display a listing of brands

Query Parameters:
- name (optional, string, max: 255, must be unique)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Store a newly created brand

Request Fields:
- name (required, string, max: 255, unique)
- image (optional, file, mimes: jpeg/png/jpg, max: 2048KB)

Display the specified brand

Path Parameters:
- brand_id (required, integer)

Update the specified brand

Path Parameters:
- brand_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- name (optional, string, max: 255, unique except current brand)
- image (optional, file, mimes: jpeg/png/jpg, max: 2048KB)

Remove the specified brand

Path Parameters:
- brand_id (required, integer)

Display a listing of suppliers

Query Parameters:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- type (optional, string, max: 100)
- status (optional, enum: active, inactive)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1)

Store a newly created supplier

Request Fields:
- name (required, string, max: 255)
- contact_email (optional, email, max: 255)
- contact_phone (optional, string, max: 20)
- status (optional, enum: active, inactive)

Display the specified supplier

Path Parameters:
- supplier_id (required, integer)

Update the specified supplier

Path Parameters:
- supplier_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- name (optional, string, max: 255, required if present)
- contact_email (optional, email, max: 255)
- contact_phone (optional, string, max: 20)
- status (optional, enum: active, inactive)

Remove the specified supplier

Path Parameters:
- supplier_id (required, integer)

Display a listing of products

Query Parameters:
- supplier_id (optional, integer, must exist in suppliers table)
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- brand_id (optional, integer, must exist in brands table)
- currency (optional, enum: usd, eur)
- status (optional, enum: in_active, active, archived)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Store a newly created product

Request Fields:
- name (required, string, max: 255)
- sku (required, string, max: 100, unique)
- brand_id (optional, integer, must exist in brands table)
- description (optional, string)
- short_description (optional, string)
- long_description (optional, string)
- face_value (required, numeric, min: 1)
- selling_price (required, numeric, min: 1)
- currency (required, enum: usd, eur)
- status (required, enum: in_active, active, archived)
- image (optional, file, mimes: jpeg/png/jpg, max: 2048KB)
- tags (optional, array)
- regions (optional, array)

Display the specified product with digital products sorted by fulfillment mode

Path Parameters:
- product_id (required, integer)

Update the specified product

Path Parameters:
- product_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- brand_id (optional, integer, must exist in brands table)
- description (optional, string)
- short_description (optional, string)
- long_description (optional, string)
- face_value (optional, numeric, min: 1)
- selling_price (optional, numeric, min: 1)
- currency (optional, enum: usd, eur)
- status (optional, enum: in_active, active, archived)
- image (optional, file)
- tags (optional, array)
- regions (optional, array)
- is_custom_priority (optional, boolean - if true, sets fulfillment_mode to MANUAL)

Remove the specified product

Path Parameters:
- product_id (required, integer)

Assign digital products to a product

Path Parameters:
- product_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- digital_product_ids (required, array, min: 1, each must exist in digital_products table)

Update the priority/order of digital products for a product

Path Parameters:
- product_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- digital_products (required, array, min: 1)
  - digital_product_id (required, integer, must exist)
  - priority_order (required, integer, min: 1)

Display a listing of digital products

Query Parameters:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- brand (optional, string, max: 255)
- supplier_id (optional, integer, must exist in suppliers table)
- currency (optional, enum: usd, eur)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Store newly created digital products

Request Fields:
- products (required, array, min: 1)
  - supplier_id (required, integer, must exist in suppliers table)
  - name (required, string, max: 255)
  - sku (required, string, max: 255)
  - brand (optional, string, max: 255)
  - description (optional, string)
  - cost_price (required, numeric, min: 0)
  - currency (required, enum: usd, eur)
  - metadata (optional, object)
  - tags (optional, array of strings, each max: 255)
  - region (optional, string, max: 255)

Display the specified digital product with supplier details

Path Parameters:
- digital_product_id (required, integer)

Update the specified digital product

Path Parameters:
- digital_product_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- sku (optional, string, max: 255)
- brand (optional, string, max: 255)
- description (optional, string)
- cost_price (optional, numeric, min: 0)
- currency (optional, enum: usd, eur)
- status (optional, enum: active, inactive)
- tags (optional, array of strings, each max: 255)
- region (optional, string, max: 255)
- metadata (optional, object)

Remove the specified digital product

Path Parameters:
- digital_product_id (required, integer)

Batch import digital products from CSV/TXT file

Request Fields:
- file (required, file, mimes: csv/txt, max: 5120KB)
- supplier_id (required, integer, must exist in suppliers table)

Display a listing of purchase orders

Query Parameters:
- order_number (optional, string, max: 244)
- supplier_id (optional, integer, must exist in suppliers table)
- status (optional, string, max: 255)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Store a newly created purchase order

Request Fields:
- items (required, array, min: 1)
  - supplier_id (required, integer, must exist in suppliers table)
  - digital_product_id (required, integer, must exist in digital_products table)
  - quantity (required, integer, min: 1)

Display the specified purchase order with items, digital products, suppliers, and vouchers

Path Parameters:
- purchase_order_id (required, integer)

Display a listing of vouchers

Query Parameters:
- purchase_order_id (optional, integer, must exist in purchase_orders table)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1)

Store vouchers via file upload or manual entry

Request Fields:
- file (optional, file, mimes: csv/txt/xlsx/xls/zip, max: 10240KB) - required if voucher_codes not provided
- voucher_codes (optional, array, min: 1) - required if file not provided
  - code (required, string, max: 255)
  - digitalProductID (required, integer, must exist in digital_products table)
- purchase_order_id (required, integer, must exist in purchase_orders table)

Retrieve voucher code and log view audit

Path Parameters:
- voucher_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- ip_address (required, valid IP address)
- user_agent (required, string)

Display a listing of digital stocks

Query Parameters:
- supplier_id (optional, integer, must exist in suppliers table)
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- stock (optional, enum: low, high)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Display digital products with low stock levels

Query Parameters:
- supplier_id (optional, integer, must exist in suppliers table)
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Display a listing of price rules

Query Parameters:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- match_type (optional, enum: all, any)
- action_mode (optional, enum: absolute, percentage)
- status (optional, enum: active, in_active)
- per_page (optional, integer, min: 1, max: 100)

Store a newly created price rule

Request Fields:
- name (required, string, max: 255)
- description (optional, string)
- match_type (required, enum: all, any - whether all or any conditions must match)
- action_operator (required, enum: +, -, = for add, subtract, or set price)
- action_mode (required, enum: absolute, percentage)
- action_value (required, numeric, min: 0)
- status (required, enum: active, in_active)
- conditions (required, array, min: 1)
  - field (required, string - the field to check)
  - operator (required, enum: =, !=, >, <, >=, <=, contains)
  - value (required, string - the value to compare)

Display the specified price rule with conditions

Path Parameters:
- price_rule_id (required, integer)

Update the specified price rule

Path Parameters:
- price_rule_id (required, integer)

Request Fields:
- name (optional, string, max: 255)
- description (optional, string)
- match_type (optional, enum: all, any)
- action_operator (optional, enum: +, -, =)
- action_mode (optional, enum: absolute, percentage)
- action_value (optional, numeric, min: 0)
- status (optional, enum: active, in_active)
- conditions (optional, array, min: 1) - replaces existing conditions

Remove the specified price rule

Path Parameters:
- price_rule_id (required, integer)

Preview the effect of a price rule without saving it

Request Fields: Same as Create Price Rule (all fields required for preview)

query.description: Sale Order Status enum values: pending, completed, cancelled

request.description:
Get paginated list of sale orders with optional filtering

Query Parameters:
- per_page (optional, integer 1-100): Items per page, default 10
- order_number (optional, string): Filter by order number
- source (optional, string): Filter by source
- status (optional, string): Filter by status - Enum: pending, completed, cancelled

Permission Required: view_sale_order

Get detailed information for a specific sale order including items and products

Path Parameters:
- sale_order_id (required, integer)

Permission Required: view_sale_order

query.description: Date format: YYYY-MM-DD, must be >= start_date

request.description:
Get paginated list of voucher audit logs with optional date range and name filtering

Query Parameters:
- per_page (optional, integer 1-100): Items per page, default 10
- page (optional, integer >= 1): Page number for pagination
- name (optional, string): Filter by voucher name
- start_date (optional, date YYYY-MM-DD): Filter from start date
- end_date (optional, date YYYY-MM-DD): Filter until end date, must be >= start_date

Permission Required: view_voucher_audit_log

Get list of activity logs with optional filtering by user, event, and date range

Query Parameters:
- user_id (optional, integer): Filter by user ID, must exist in users table
- event (optional, string): Filter by event type or name
- date_from (optional, date YYYY-MM-DD): Filter from start date
- date_to (optional, date YYYY-MM-DD): Filter until end date

Permission Required: view_activity_log

Get paginated list of supplier Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Query Parameters:
- supplier_id (optional, integer): Filter by specific supplier, must exist in suppliers table
- per_page (optional, integer >= 1): Items per page for pagination, default 10

Permission Required: view_supplier_kpi
